title: The Pet Store Throw Me Ball Dog Toy, Resilient Mega Bounce Ball, compatible with launchers for Throwing & Retrieval Games, Encourages Healthy Exercise for Your Dog, Blue/Green and Grey/Orange
features: The Pet Store Throw Me Ball is designed to offer mega bounce, for hours of fun for your dog.
Ideal for throwing and retrieval games, the Throw Me Ball is compatible with ball launchers and is buoyant should it land in water.
Easy to find, avoid lost balls as the bright colours can easily be seen during outdoor play.
Made from tough durable non-toxic Thermoplastic Rubber, dirt and dribble are easily washed off.
Included components: 1 pack of 2 throw me balls
Part of an extensive range of dog toys from The Pet Store that are designed to keep your pets happy and healthy by encouraging stimulation and exercise.
